---
name: Bug report
description: Report a bug, broken link, wrong formula, or rendering issue.
title: "[Bug] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## What happened?

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## Where?

- Page or note (URL or path): e.g. `notes/03-kohn-sham.md`
- Section heading (if applicable):

## What did you expect?

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## How to reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Go to '...'
2. Scroll to '...'
3. See the issue

## Screenshots / output

If applicable, add screenshots or copy-paste the rendered output.

## Environment

- Browser (if web): e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121
- Device: e.g. desktop, mobile (Pixel 7)
- Operating system: e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
